programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: (PG) While shopping with Jerry, Elaine spots an old bike just like the one she had as a girl. Jerry is distracted by a customer and won't help her get it down, Elaine injures her neck.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: (PG) While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.desc: A stand-up comedian navigates everyday life in New York with his eccentric group of friends, dealing with trivial yet absurd situations. Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Seinfield: Episode

Their conversations and misadventures revolve around social awkwardness, relationships, and the minutiae of daily life. Through ironic twists and self-centered decisions, their actions often lead to humorous and unexpected consequences.
